title: GLP-1 Medication Support Course for Fitness Professionals
description:
Empower your practice to support clients using GLP-1 medications such as Ozempic® and Wegovy® with this 100% online, self-paced training. Designed for fitness and wellness professionals, the course provides practical strategies to confidently guide clients through the physical, behavioral, and emotional changes that accompany GLP-1-supported weight loss.

You’ll explore how GLP-1s work in the body, learn to adapt exercise and nutrition plans for common side effects, develop effective communication skills for collaborating with healthcare providers, and build long-term wellness habits that extend beyond medication use. Ideal for personal trainers, health coaches, yoga instructors, and wellness professionals looking to stand out in a rapidly evolving niche, this program offers six Continuing Education Units (CEUs), video lessons, case studies, toolkits, and an open-book final exam.
